label: VE3
evidence: In the supplementary materials (Extended Data Fig. 3a, Supplementary Table 6) and main text, clusters labeled as 'VE1', 'VE2', 'VE3', etc. refer to distinct populations of vascular endothelial cells; 'VE3' is listed as 'vascular endothelial 3' in mapping tables and UMAP plots in the context of adult and prenatal human skin atlas.
